name: FICA KYC — SA Accounting
description: Comprehensive FICA/KYC compliance checklist for South African accounting firms. Covers identity verification, company registration, tax clearance, banking confirmation, beneficial ownership, and source of funds — aligned with FICA Amendment Act requirements.

items.name: Certified ID Copy
items.description: Certified copy of director/member ID document. For sole proprietors, the proprietor's ID. For companies, all directors with >25% ownership.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Certified ID document (certified within last 3 months)

items.name: Proof of Residence
items.description: Utility bill or bank statement not older than 3 months, confirming residential address of the director/proprietor.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Proof of residence (utility bill or bank statement, <3 months)

items.name: Company Registration (CM29/CoR14.3)
items.description: CIPC company registration certificate. Required for Pty Ltd, CC, and NPC entities. Not applicable to sole proprietors.

items.name: Tax Clearance Certificate
items.description: SARS tax clearance certificate or Tax Compliance Status (TCS) pin. Confirms the entity is in good standing with SARS.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: SARS tax clearance certificate or TCS pin

items.name: Bank Confirmation Letter
items.description: Confirmation of banking details issued by the client's bank. Required for payment processing and invoice reconciliation.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Bank confirmation letter (original or certified copy)

items.name: Proof of Business Address
items.description: Lease agreement or utility bill for business premises. Confirms the entity has a physical place of business.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Proof of business address (lease or utility bill)

items.name: Resolution / Mandate
items.description: Board resolution or member mandate authorising the engagement with the accounting firm. Recommended for Pty Ltd and CC entities.

items.name: Beneficial Ownership Declaration
items.description: Declaration identifying all ultimate beneficial owners holding >25% interest. Required by FICA Amendment Act for all non-natural person entities.

items.name: Source of Funds Declaration
items.description: Client declaration on the source of business funds. Required on a risk-based approach — mandatory for higher-risk clients (trusts, politically exposed persons, high-turnover entities).

items.name: Letters of Authority (Master's Office)
items.description: Letters of Authority issued by the Master of the High Court, confirming the appointed trustees. Required for all trust entities.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Letters of Authority from the Master's Office

items.name: Trust Deed (Certified Copy)
items.description: Certified copy of the trust deed, confirming the terms of the trust, beneficiaries, and trustees. Required for all trust entities.
